bug_summary: Structured path tools (read/write/edit/ls/glob/grep) passed the raw `path` argument straight to `PathBuf::from`, so a leading `~`/`~/...` was never expanded to $HOME and the tool operated on a literal `~` path, silently failing or hitting the wrong location.

cases.title: read tool stops expanding leading `~` and uses the literal path
cases.instructions: Review this diff. Return only the JSON object requested by the system prompt.

cases.title: file-open helper treats `~/...` as a literal path
cases.instructions: Review this diff. Return only the JSON object requested by the system prompt.
